column1: # VERIFIED = hands-on. One row per class. TAB separated.
# class <TAB> date <TAB> artifact-path <TAB> verdict
# A row is REFUSED by tools/coverage.py if the artifact path does not exist.
# This rung is deliberately NOT derived: measured 2026-07-22, parsing the
# doc tails scored 6 on a set where the re-count found 2-3, and it erred in
# BOTH directions (4 invented, 1 missed). A syntactic proxy is not admissible
# on the only rung that means "works for the player".
# Adding a row is a claim that a HUMAN played it and said so. An autonomous
# smoke, an e2e selftest, or a harness run NEVER earns a row here -- those are
# the AS-BUILT sub-partition, parsed from the doc tail, and they stay there.
# EXCLUDED, with the reason, so the absence is not read as an oversight:
#   Aeyer_C -- COOP_RNG_AUTHORITY.md:68 reads "the row goes VERIFIED only on a
#     live owner_entity: OWN 'eyer_C' spawned locally from a NATURAL/night
#     roll". That is a pre-registered CONDITION, not a verdict. The 2026-07-22
#     pass counted this row as one of "3 hands-on VERIFIED" by reading the
#     token; re-reading the sentence shows it says the opposite. The lane is
#     DONE-OWNER-ENTITY awaiting its natural-roll take.
#     research/handson_runbook_2026-07-10_eve_v108.md exercised it via the F1
#     dev spawn, which is explicitly NOT the registered condition.
AactorChipPile_C
column4: take-30: rotation + sound fixed, user-confirmed on the live throw
